description: The image displays the logo of the European Environment Agency (EEA). The logo consists of the text "European Environment Agency" in black, sans-serif font, positioned to the left of a graphical emblem. The emblem is a stylised motif combining elements of a flower or sun and a gear. It features an outer ring of teal-coloured, petal-like shapes and an inner ring of blue, gear-like cogs that appear to interlock with the outer components.
